RAMP OS v1.0.0

By Antigravity

Global Financial Infrastructure

The fastest way to integrate fiat-to-crypto payments. Compliant, secure, and developer-first.

Get Started Read Documentation

Everything you need to scale

A complete financial stack designed for high-growth platforms. Reliable, scalable, and secure by default.

Global Coverage

Accept payments from 150+ countries. Support for local payment methods and 40+ fiat currencies.

Enterprise Security

SOC2 Type II certified. Bank-grade encryption and isolated infrastructure for maximum security.

Instant Settlement

Lightning fast settlement times with automated reconciliation and real-time ledger updates.

Compliance Ready

Built-in KYC/AML screening with automated reporting. Regulatory compliance across 150+ jurisdictions.

Developer First

Modern API design with typed SDKs, webhooks, and comprehensive documentation for easy integration.

24/7 Support

Dedicated account managers and round-the-clock technical support for your critical infrastructure.

How It Works

Get started with RampOS in four simple steps. From integration to settlement in minutes.

1

Integrate API

Connect to our REST API in minutes with simple configuration.

2

KYC your users

Automated identity verification for compliance and safety.

3

Accept payments

Support for VND and Crypto payments seamlessly.

4

Instant settlement

Real-time reconciliation and fund availability.

Developer-First API

Built by developers, for developers. Our API is designed to be intuitive, predictable, and easy to integrate. Get started in minutes with our SDKs.

  • Type-safe SDKs for all major languages
  • Comprehensive documentation & examples
  • Webhooks for real-time updates
  • Sandbox environment for testing
example.ts
// Initialize RampOS Client
const client = new RampClient({
  apiKey: 'pk_live_...',
  environment: 'production'
});

// Create a Payment Intent
const intent = await client.intents.create({
  amount: 1000,
  currency: 'USD',
  user: {
    id: 'user_123',
    email: 'user@example.com'
  }
});

console.log('Payment Intent Created:', intent.id);

Join the fastest-growing companies building on RampOS. Start integrating today or talk to our sales team.
